name: Jan Schakowsky
stanceSummary: Schakowsky has publicly pushed for ceasefire extension, humanitarian access, and a two-state pathway while also affirming Israeli security concerns. Track AIPAC reports Israel Lobby funding for this candidacy.

timeline.event: Track AIPAC congressional listing records Israel Lobby Total: $2,516,441.
Public statements and congressional record context were reviewed for stance classification updates.
House statement called for extending ceasefire to secure hostage release and move toward a durable peace framework.
